title: Splitting Arms
wikitext:
[]: Splitting Arms             Quote Post by brainDamage » Mon Nov 13, 2006 5:55 am I was watching EOE for the zillionth time and decided to ask people's opinion on Asuka's actual arm splitting inside the plug. Why does this happen? She also bleeds out of her eye sockets. The pilots don't seem to suffer physical damage from attacks previously in the series, so why now? Any thoughts? I assumed that this might have already been answered, so I put it in chit-chat in the attempt to not be offensive. I suppose my guess would be that it is because the lance holds special capabilities.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 6:16 am Astoundingly high sync rate? I would suspect she is close to 100% during that whole battle. I've always been under the assumption that with a high enough sync rate, damage to the Eva is felt as injuries to the pilot (ref episode 2). If the consensus here is otherwise, I respectfully withdraw. In any case, the immediate next shot after her arm splitting inside the plug was of a thrown Lance splitting the Eva's arm in two.. which is a heck of a shot, kind of like splitting an arrow, since she was reaching up to the departing Evas at the same time. The bigger question for me is - with all the other MP EVAs dead/down/etc, who was it who threw the lance that got 02 in between the eyes in the first place? :?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:44 pm t3h Mock Spears Did it!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Nov 13, 2006 3:20 pm BERSERKER!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Nov 13, 2006 3:45 pm I believe its to do with the high sync ratio, I think at that point she practically hits 100% so whatever happens to the Eva happens to her as well or something like a perfect sync. So when the lance is put through the eye it effects her in the plug. Thats like the logical explanation for it. The other explanation is it adds more drama to the scene, but that one sounds boring.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 4:54 pm Jay911 wrote: The bigger question for me is - with all the other MP EVAs dead/down/etc, who was it who threw the lance that got 02 in between the eyes in the first place? :?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Nov 13, 2006 6:49 pm Reichu wrote: I know this stuff has been covered in gruesome detail before, but I can't remember where.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 13, 2006 7:34 pm I didn't think it had to do with a high Synch Ratio or not, but I just thought in general the Pilots could feel whatever their Eva feels?? Eitherway, how could you not feel something like THIS? *shudders* Hmm...I guess it's just artistic licesene, but shouldn't Asuka's right hand be fully unworkable ie how can she do, this: if her whole arm was split in half?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Nov 13, 2006 7:40 pm ITS A CARTOON!!!! its not supposed to make sence lol

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 13, 2006 7:44 pm Her right arm likely works because she just got back from you know, an event in which EVERYONE IN THE PLANET WAS REDUCED TO A YELLOWISH SEA OF GOO, just like Shinji isn't his liquid self that was inside Shogoki during most of 3I. In before someone who didn't notice Shinji got tanged aswell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 8:06 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 13, 2006 8:09 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I didn't think it had to do with a high Synch Ratio or not, but I just thought in general the Pilots could feel whatever their Eva feels?? Eitherway, how could you not feel something like THIS? *shudders* Hmm...I guess it's just artistic licesene, but shouldn't Asuka's right hand be fully unworkable ie how can she do, this: if her whole arm was split in half?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 8:13 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Well the body with the split arm got vaporized when the Harpies blasted the Black Moon free from the Earth. Her body at the end is a brand spanking new body.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 13, 2006 8:19 pm Reichu VTOLs are made of metal, Asuka isn't. The last spear had to have put a hole in the entry plug, not to mention the damage that must have been caused to it by their feeding frenzy. I doubt it was providing her any protection at that point. Fixed typo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 8:56 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: VOLTs

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 13, 2006 9:03 pm Hmm missed that. Anyways no matter where EVA-02 and the entry plug ended up they both got destroyed at some point, weather incenerated by the blast or Yui ripping HIP a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 13, 2006 9:14 pm .....If Asuka indeed has a brand new body, then why the frig does she still have those injuries?! :shock: (Anno-sensei, I want the last year of my life back!) Let me guess: either artistic licesnce again, and/or showing the parallels between episodes 1 and 26'. Rei III showing up, Rei II and Asuka's injuries mirroring each other; bascially more or less bringing things back full circle.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 9:52 pm Her arm ain't split in half, is it? Bandages do not an injury make.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 13, 2006 10:08 pm Perhaps that's how she imagined herself in her heart (whatever that means)?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 13, 2006 10:10 pm 2 words: security blanket! Bad memories of the Harpies needed something for her peace of mind. She isn't displaying any visable signs of pain when Shinji isn't choaking her. Nor are the bandages soaked in blood. (Anno-sensei, I want the last year of my life back!)
